source.sqlReaderQuery:
WITH M1 AS 
(
	SELECT 
	 A.EmployeePK
	,A.IncentivePlanID
	,A.Division
	,A.PeriodDate
	,A.[DistributionType]
	,B.PV_OverrideFlag
	,B.Min_PayoutFlag
	,B.Pct_EmployeeMinPayout
	,SUM(A.EarnedIncentiveAmount)		AS TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount
	,SUM(A.EligibleIncentiveTarget)		AS EligibleIncentiveTarget
	FROM EDW_INC.FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY  A
	LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES] B
	ON   A.EmployeePK = B.EmployeePK
	AND  A.Division	  = B.Division
	AND  A.PeriodDate = B.PeriodDate
	GROUP BY 
	A.EmployeePK
	,A.IncentivePlanID
	,A.Division
	,A.PeriodDate
	,A.[DistributionType]
	,B.PV_OverrideFlag
	,B.Min_PayoutFlag
	,B.Pct_EmployeeMinPayout
	
	),
	
M2 AS 
(
	SELECT *,
	CASE WHEN COALESCE(PV_Bonus,0.00) > COALESCE(Min_Payout_Bonus,0.00) THEN PV_Bonus ELSE Min_Payout_Bonus END AS Qualified_Min_Bonus
	FROM 
	(
		SELECT *,
			CASE WHEN PV_OverrideFlag = 'Y' THEN EligibleIncentiveTarget * 1.00 					END AS PV_Bonus,   			-- 100 % Minimum Bonus
			CASE WHEN Min_PayoutFlag  = 'Y' THEN EligibleIncentiveTarget * Pct_EmployeeMinPayout 	END AS Min_Payout_Bonus   	-- Percentage from Employee Min Payout
			FROM M1 
		) M1_X
		
	)
	


SELECT *,
CASE WHEN COALESCE(EligibleIncentiveTarget,0.00)=0.00 THEN 0.00 ELSE ( COALESCE(TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount_PostOverride,0.00) * 1.000 / COALESCE(EligibleIncentiveTarget,0.00) * 1.000 ) END AS Pct_IncentivePoolEarned_PostOverride,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	EmployeePK
	,IncentivePlanID
	,Division
	,PeriodDate
	,DistributionType
	,PV_OverrideFlag
	,Min_PayoutFlag
	,TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount
	,EligibleIncentiveTarget
	,CASE WHEN 	COALESCE(Qualified_Min_Bonus,0.00) > COALESCE(TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount,0.00) THEN Qualified_Min_Bonus ELSE 	TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount END 	AS TotalEarnedIncentiveAmount_PostOverride
	
	FROM M2
	
	) M2_1

scripts.text:
DECLARE @Year INT;
SET @Year = 2026;


-- ============================================================
-- STEP 1: Query 1 
-- ============================================================

-- ************ Employees where PV metric is at Regional level (applicable Regional Employees)

SELECT DISTINCT 
	A.EmployeePK,
    INC.PeriodDate,
    INC.IncentiveMetricID AS PersonalVolumeMetricID,
	D.DistributionType,
    A.Division,
    A.PV_OverridePct,
    INC.PerformanceRatio AS PV_PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EMP_PV_Override_1
FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] A
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN] B
    ON A.IncentivePlanID = B.IncentivePlanID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION] D
    ON A.IncentivePlanID      	= D.IncentivePlanID
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric 	= D.IncentiveMetricID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] INC
    ON 	A.EmployeePK           = INC.EmployeePK
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric = INC.IncentiveMetricID
    AND A.Division             = INC.Division 

WHERE COALESCE(A.PV_Regional_At_Division_Override,'N') = 'N' 
OR A.PV_Regional_At_Division_Override='' ;



--#####################################################################################
-- ************START : Employees where PV metric is at Division level (applicable Regional Employees)
--#####################################################################################

SELECT DISTINCT 
	A.EmployeePK,
    INC.PeriodDate,
    INC.IncentiveMetricID AS PersonalVolumeMetricID,
	D.DistributionType,
    A.Division,
    A.PV_OverridePct,
    INC.PerformanceRatio AS PV_PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EMP_PV_Override_2
FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] A
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN] B
    ON A.IncentivePlanID = B.IncentivePlanID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION] D
    ON A.IncentivePlanID      	= D.IncentivePlanID
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric 	= D.IncentiveMetricID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] INC
    ON 	A.EmployeePK           = INC.EmployeePK
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric = INC.IncentiveMetricID
    AND A.Division             = INC.Division 

WHERE COALESCE(A.PV_Regional_At_Division_Override,'N') = 'Y' ;


--************ DIVISION LEVEL METRIC CALCULATION **************


SELECT 
Metric,
Division,
PeriodDate,
DistributionType,
SUM(BudgetValue) AS Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT
INTO #T_BUDGET_1
FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric IN ('ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT','NETSALES_AMT')
GROUP BY 
Metric,
Division,
PeriodDate,
DistributionType;



SELECT 
Division,
'MONTHLY' 				AS DistributionType,
EOMONTH(CalendarDate) 	AS CalendarDate,
SUM(NET_ISSUED) 		AS NET_ISSUED,
SUM(NETSALES_AMT) 		AS NETSALES_AMT
INTO #T_ACTUAL
FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE] 
WHERE IDENTIFIER='APPOINTMENT_DATE' AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI') 
AND YEAR(CalendarDate) = @Year
GROUP BY Division,
EOMONTH(CalendarDate);



SELECT 
A.Division,
A.PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
A.Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,
B.Budget_NETSALES_AMT
INTO #T_BUDGET
FROM
(
	SELECT 
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT
	FROM #T_BUDGET_1 WHERE Metric='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT'
	) A
LEFT JOIN 
(
	SELECT 
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT AS Budget_NETSALES_AMT
	FROM #T_BUDGET_1 WHERE Metric='NETSALES_AMT'
	) B
ON	A.Division		= B.Division
AND A.PeriodDate	= B.PeriodDate
AND A.DistributionType = B.DistributionType;




SELECT 
Division,
PeriodDate,
DistributionType,
Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,
Budget_NETSALES_AMT,
NET_ISSUED,
NETSALES_AMT,

(NET_ISSUED 	* 1.000 / Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT 	* 1.000 ) AS PV_PerformanceRatio_Issued_Lead,
(NETSALES_AMT 	* 1.000 / Budget_NETSALES_AMT 		* 1.000 ) AS PV_PerformanceRatio_NetSales_Amt

INTO 
#T_YEARLY_METRICS
FROM 
(

		SELECT 
		A.Division,
		A.PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,	
		A.Budget_NETSALES_AMT,
		COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0) AS  NET_ISSUED,
		COALESCE(B.NETSALES_AMT,0.000) AS NETSALES_AMT
		FROM #T_BUDGET A
		LEFT JOIN  #T_ACTUAL B
		ON A.Division			= B.Division
		AND A.PeriodDate		= B.CalendarDate
		AND A.DistributionType	= B.DistributionType
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		
		SELECT 
		A.Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0))) 	AS PeriodDate,
		'QUARTERLY' 																	AS DistributionType,
		SUM(A.Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT) 												AS Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,	
		SUM(A.Budget_NETSALES_AMT) 														AS Budget_NETSALES_AMT,
		SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0))													AS NET_ISSUED,
		SUM(COALESCE(B.NETSALES_AMT,0.000)) 											AS NETSALES_AMT
		FROM #T_BUDGET A
		LEFT JOIN  #T_ACTUAL B
		ON A.Division			= B.Division
		AND A.PeriodDate		= B.CalendarDate
		AND A.DistributionType	= B.DistributionType
		GROUP BY 
		A.Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0)))
		
		
		
		UNION ALL 
		
		
		SELECT 
		A.Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1)) 	AS PeriodDate,
		'YEARLY' 										AS DistributionType,
		SUM(A.Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT) 				AS Budget_ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT,	
		SUM(A.Budget_NETSALES_AMT) 						AS Budget_NETSALES_AMT,
		SUM(COALESCE(B.NET_ISSUED,0))					AS NET_ISSUED,
		SUM(COALESCE(B.NETSALES_AMT,0.000)) 			AS NETSALES_AMT
		FROM #T_BUDGET A
		LEFT JOIN  #T_ACTUAL B
		ON A.Division			= B.Division
		AND A.PeriodDate		= B.CalendarDate
		AND A.DistributionType	= B.DistributionType
		GROUP BY 
		A.Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1)) 
		
		) M1;





UPDATE A
SET A.PV_PerformanceRatio = B.PV_PerformanceRatio_NetSales_Amt
FROM
#T_EMP_PV_Override_2 A
JOIN #T_YEARLY_METRICS B 
ON  A.PeriodDate		= B.PeriodDate
AND A.DistributionType	= B.DistributionType
AND A.Division			= B.Division
WHERE A.PersonalVolumeMetricID='NETSALES_AMT';


UPDATE A
SET A.PV_PerformanceRatio = B.PV_PerformanceRatio_NetSales_Amt
FROM
#T_EMP_PV_Override_2 A
JOIN #T_YEARLY_METRICS B 
ON  A.PeriodDate		= B.PeriodDate
AND A.DistributionType	= B.DistributionType
AND A.Division			= B.Division
WHERE A.PersonalVolumeMetricID='ISSUED_LEAD_COUNT';





SELECT * INTO #T_EMP_PV_Override
FROM 
	( 
		SELECT * FROM #T_EMP_PV_Override_1
		UNION ALL 
		SELECT * FROM #T_EMP_PV_Override_2
		) M1;
	  




--#####################################################################################
-- ************END : Employees where PV metric is at Division level (applicable Regional Employees)
--#####################################################################################



-- ============================================================
-- STEP 2: EBITDA MOnthly Quarterly and Yearly Grain
-- ============================================================



WITH M1 AS 
(	
SELECT 
	'DIVISION_EBITDA' AS Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue,
	SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue
	FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
	WHERE Metric = 'DIVISION_EBITDA'
	AND Division IS NOT NULL
	AND [Year] = @Year
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate
	
	UNION ALL 
	
	SELECT 
	'NET_REVENUE' AS Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue,
	SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue
	FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
	WHERE Metric = 'NET_REVENUE'
	AND Division IS NOT NULL
	AND [Year] = @Year
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate

	
	),

M2  AS
(
	SELECT 
	Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	ActualValue,
	BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	
	UNION ALL 
	
	
	SELECT 
		Override_Metric,
		Division,
		'QUARTERLY'                                                                 AS DistributionType,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0))) AS PeriodDate,
		SUM(ActualValue)                                                            AS ActualValue,
		SUM(BudgetValue)                                                            AS BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	GROUP BY 
	Override_Metric,
		Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0)))
		
		
	UNION ALL 
	
	
	SELECT 
		Override_Metric,
		Division,
		'YEARLY'		                                                                 	AS DistributionType,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1)) 								 		AS PeriodDate,
		SUM(ActualValue)                                                            		AS ActualValue,
		SUM(BudgetValue)                                                            		AS BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	GROUP BY 
	Override_Metric,
		Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1))
		
		)
		

SELECT 
Override_Metric,
Division,
DistributionType,
PeriodDate,
ActualValue,
BudgetValue,
(ActualValue * 1.000 / BudgetValue * 1.000 ) AS PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EBITDA

FROM M2;
	
	


SELECT 
A.Division,
A.DistributionType,
A.PeriodDate,
A.PerformanceRatio AS EBITDA_PerformanceRatio,
( A.ActualValue * 1.00 / B.ActualValue * 1.00 ) / ( A.BudgetValue * 1.00 / B.BudgetValue * 1.00 ) AS EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EBITDA_PCT

FROM 
( SELECT * FROM #T_EBITDA A  WHERE Override_Metric='DIVISION_EBITDA' ) A 
LEFT JOIN 
( SELECT * FROM #T_EBITDA A  WHERE Override_Metric='NET_REVENUE' ) B 
ON  A.Division 			= B.Division 
AND A.DistributionType  = B.DistributionType
AND A.PeriodDate		= B.PeriodDate





-- ============================================================
-- STEP 3: Combined Performance Ratios
-- ============================================================


TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES];


INSERT INTO [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES]
(
EmployeePK					,
PeriodDate					,
PersonalVolumeMetricID		,
DistributionType			,
Division					,
PV_OverridePct				,
PV_PerformanceRatio			,
EBITDA_PerformanceRatio		,
EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio	,
Pct_EmployeeMinPayout		,
PV_OverrideFlag				,
Min_PayoutFlag				,
LastUpdatedTS	
)


SELECT 
A.EmployeePK	,
A.PeriodDate	,
A.PersonalVolumeMetricID	,
A.DistributionType	,
A.Division	,
A.PV_OverridePct	,
A.PV_PerformanceRatio	,
B.EBITDA_PerformanceRatio					AS EBITDA_PerformanceRatio	,
B.EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio				AS EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio	,
C.Pct_MinPayout	,
( CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.PV_PerformanceRatio,0.00) > A.PV_OverridePct	 AND B.EBITDA_PerformanceRatio	>= 1.00 AND B.EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio >= 1.00	THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )  AS PV_OverrideFlag ,
( CASE WHEN C.Pct_MinPayout IS NOT NULL AND C.Pct_MinPayout!=0.00				THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )	 AS Min_PayoutFlag	,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS	

FROM  #T_EMP_PV_Override A
LEFT JOIN #T_EBITDA_PCT B
ON   A.Division   = B.Division
AND  A.PeriodDate = B.PeriodDate
AND  A.DistributionType = B.DistributionType

LEFT JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT 
				A1.EmployeePK,
				A2.PeriodDate,
				A1.EmployeeID,
				A2.Pct_MinPayout
				FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] A1 
				JOIN EDW_INC.REF_EMPLOYEE_MIN_BONUS_PAYOUT A2
				ON A1.EmployeeID = A2.EmployeeID
			) C
ON A.PeriodDate  = ( CASE 
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(C.PeriodDate)
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,C.PeriodDate),0)))
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(C.PeriodDate),12,1))
					  END
						)
AND A.EmployeePK = C.EmployeePK;

DECLARE @Year INT;
SET @Year = 2026;


-- ============================================================
-- STEP 1: Query 1 
-- ============================================================

-- ************ Employees where PV metric is at Regional level (applicable Regional Employees)

SELECT DISTINCT 
	A.EmployeePK,
    INC.PeriodDate,
    INC.IncentiveMetricID AS PersonalVolumeMetricID,
	D.DistributionType,
    A.Division,
    A.PV_OverridePct,
    INC.PerformanceRatio AS PV_PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EMP_PV_Override
FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] A
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN] B
    ON A.IncentivePlanID = B.IncentivePlanID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION] D
    ON A.IncentivePlanID      	= D.IncentivePlanID
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric 	= D.IncentiveMetricID
JOIN [EDW_INC].[FACT_INCENTIVE_EARNED_MONTHLY] INC
    ON 	A.EmployeePK           = INC.EmployeePK
    AND A.PersonalVolumeMetric = INC.IncentiveMetricID
    AND A.Division             = INC.Division ;




-- ============================================================
-- STEP 2: EBITDA MOnthly Quarterly and Yearly Grain
-- ============================================================



WITH M1 AS 
(	
SELECT 
	'DIVISION_EBITDA' AS Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue,
	SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue
	FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
	WHERE Metric = 'DIVISION_EBITDA'
	AND Division IS NOT NULL
	AND [Year] = @Year
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate
	
	UNION ALL 
	
	SELECT 
	'NET_REVENUE' AS Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	SUM(ActualValue) AS ActualValue,
	SUM(BudgetValue) AS BudgetValue
	FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] 
	WHERE Metric = 'NET_REVENUE'
	AND Division IS NOT NULL
	AND [Year] = @Year
	GROUP BY 
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate

	
	),

M2  AS
(
	SELECT 
	Override_Metric,
	Division,
	DistributionType,
	PeriodDate,
	ActualValue,
	BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	
	UNION ALL 
	
	
	SELECT 
		Override_Metric,
		Division,
		'QUARTERLY'                                                                 AS DistributionType,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0))) AS PeriodDate,
		SUM(ActualValue)                                                            AS ActualValue,
		SUM(BudgetValue)                                                            AS BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	GROUP BY 
	Override_Metric,
		Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,PeriodDate),0)))
		
		
	UNION ALL 
	
	
	SELECT 
		Override_Metric,
		Division,
		'YEARLY'		                                                                 	AS DistributionType,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1)) 								 		AS PeriodDate,
		SUM(ActualValue)                                                            		AS ActualValue,
		SUM(BudgetValue)                                                            		AS BudgetValue
	FROM M1
	GROUP BY 
	Override_Metric,
		Division,
		EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(PeriodDate),12,1))
		
		)
		

SELECT 
Override_Metric,
Division,
DistributionType,
PeriodDate,
ActualValue,
BudgetValue,
(ActualValue * 1.000 / BudgetValue * 1.000 ) AS PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EBITDA

FROM M2;
	
	


SELECT 
A.Division,
A.DistributionType,
A.PeriodDate,
A.PerformanceRatio AS EBITDA_PerformanceRatio,
( A.ActualValue * 1.00 / B.ActualValue * 1.00 ) / ( A.BudgetValue * 1.00 / B.BudgetValue * 1.00 ) AS EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio

INTO #T_EBITDA_PCT

FROM 
( SELECT * FROM #T_EBITDA A  WHERE Override_Metric='DIVISION_EBITDA' ) A 
LEFT JOIN 
( SELECT * FROM #T_EBITDA A  WHERE Override_Metric='NET_REVENUE' ) B 
ON  A.Division 			= B.Division 
AND A.DistributionType  = B.DistributionType
AND A.PeriodDate		= B.PeriodDate




-- ============================================================
-- STEP 3: Combined Performance Ratios
-- ============================================================


TRUNCATE TABLE [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES];


INSERT INTO [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES]
(
EmployeePK					,
PeriodDate					,
PersonalVolumeMetricID		,
DistributionType			,
Division					,
PV_OverridePct				,
PV_PerformanceRatio			,
EBITDA_PerformanceRatio		,
EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio	,
Pct_EmployeeMinPayout		,
PV_OverrideFlag				,
Min_PayoutFlag				,
LastUpdatedTS	
)


SELECT 
A.EmployeePK	,
A.PeriodDate	,
A.PersonalVolumeMetricID	,
A.DistributionType	,
A.Division	,
A.PV_OverridePct	,
A.PV_PerformanceRatio	,
B.EBITDA_PerformanceRatio					AS EBITDA_PerformanceRatio	,
B.EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio				AS EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio	,
C.Pct_MinPayout	,
( CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.PV_PerformanceRatio,0.00) > A.PV_OverridePct	 AND B.EBITDA_PerformanceRatio	>= 1.00 AND B.EBITDA_PCT_PerformanceRatio >= 1.00	THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )  AS PV_OverrideFlag ,
( CASE WHEN C.Pct_MinPayout IS NOT NULL AND C.Pct_MinPayout!=0.00				THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END )	 AS Min_PayoutFlag	,
GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS	

FROM  #T_EMP_PV_Override A
LEFT JOIN #T_EBITDA_PCT B
ON   A.Division   = B.Division
AND  A.PeriodDate = B.PeriodDate
AND  A.DistributionType = B.DistributionType

LEFT JOIN 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT 
				A1.EmployeePK,
				A2.PeriodDate,
				A1.EmployeeID,
				A2.Pct_MinPayout
				FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] A1 
				JOIN EDW_INC.REF_EMPLOYEE_MIN_BONUS_PAYOUT A2
				ON A1.EmployeeID = A2.EmployeeID
			) C
ON A.PeriodDate  = ( CASE 
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(C.PeriodDate)
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,C.PeriodDate),0)))
						WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(C.PeriodDate),12,1))
					  END
						)
AND A.EmployeePK = C.EmployeePK;

--NETSALES 


DECLARE @Year INT
SET 	@Year = 2026

--#####################################################################################
-- ************START : Employees where PV metric is at Division level (applicable Regional Employees)
--#####################################################################################


--##################### Start : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################
-- ############### Start : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################

SELECT 
DISTINCT 
M1.IncentivePlanCategory,
M1.IncentivePlanID,
M1.SubSourceFlag,
M1.SubSourceID,
SS.Market_SubSource 	AS SubSource,
M3.IncentiveMetricID,
M2.DistributionType,
M2.RegionalMetricFlag,
M1.EffectiveFrom 	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom,
M1.EffectiveTo  	AS IncentivePlanEffectiveTo
INTO #T_INC
FROM EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_PLAN M1
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_ALLOCATION M2
ON M1.IncentivePlanID = M2.IncentivePlanID
JOIN EDW_INC.DIM_INCENTIVE_METRICS M3
ON M2.IncentiveMetricID = M3.IncentiveMetricID
LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] SS
ON M1.SubSourceID = SS.Region_SubSource_ID;


--*******************************



SELECT DISTINCT
	EOMONTH(C.CalendarDate) AS CalendarDate,
	D.Division,
	INC.IncentivePlanID,
	INC.IncentivePlanCategory,
	INC.IncentiveMetricID,
	INC.DistributionType,
	INC.SubSourceFlag,
	INC.SubSource,
	INC.RegionalMetricFlag
	
	INTO #T_CAL
	FROM 
		EDW.DIM_CALENDAR C
	CROSS JOIN 
		( 
			SELECT DISTINCT Division FROM EDW.DIM_JOB_STATUS
			
			) D
	LEFT JOIN #T_INC INC
	ON 1=1
	WHERE  
	C.CalendarDate>=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveFrom 
	AND C.CalendarDate<=INC.IncentivePlanEffectiveTo;



--*******************************




SELECT 
DISTINCT 
B.EmployeePK,
CASE 
        WHEN DistributionType = 'YEARLY' 
            THEN DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(CalendarDate), 12, 31)

        WHEN DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'
            THEN EOMONTH(
                    DATEADD(MONTH, 
                        (3 - MONTH(CalendarDate) % 3) % 3, 
                        CalendarDate
                    )
                 )

        ELSE CalendarDate
    END AS PeriodDate,
A.DistributionType,
B.Division,
A.SubSource,
CAST(NULL AS NVARCHAR(100)) AS ACU_ID,   --- REMOVING MARKTET LEVEL TO Process PV METRIC WHICH ARE AT NON MARKET LEVEL
A.IncentiveMetricID,
A.IncentivePlanID,
A.IncentivePlanCategory,

B.EffectiveFrom 	AS EmployeeEffectiveFrom,
B.EffectiveTo		AS EmployeeEffectiveTo

INTO #T_EMP

FROM #T_CAL A 
JOIN [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_ELIGIBLE_EMPLOYEE] B
ON 	A.IncentivePlanID 	= B.IncentivePlanID
AND A.Division 			= B.Division

LEFT JOIN [EDW_INC].[REF_INCENTIVE_MARKET_SUBSOURCE] RG
ON B.RegionID = RG.Region_SubSource_ID

WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID ='NETSALES_AMT'
AND COALESCE(B.PV_Regional_At_Division_Override,'N') = 'Y' ;




IF OBJECT_ID('tempdb..#T_EMP_METRICS') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS;
	
CREATE TABLE #T_EMP_METRICS
(
	EmployeePK 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Division 			NVARCHAR(100)	,
    PeriodDate 			DATE			,
    IncentiveMetricID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    DistributionType 	NVARCHAR(50)	,
	IncentivePlanID 	NVARCHAR(100)	,
    Metric_Budget 		DECIMAL(18,6)	,
	Metric_Actual 		DECIMAL(18,6)	
);




-- ############### END : METRIC CALCULATION REFERENCE SET #################
--##################### End : COMMON CODE to calculate Metrics ###################





--#############################################################
-- ********  Metric_4    NETSALES_AMT   ***********
--#############################################################
	


INSERT INTO #T_EMP_METRICS

SELECT 
M1.EmployeePK							,
M1.Division								,
M1.PeriodDate							,
M1.IncentiveMetricID					,
M1.DistributionType						,
M1.IncentivePlanID						,
(M1.Metric_Budget) 	AS Metric_Budget,
(M2.NETSALES_AMT) 	AS Metric_Actual
FROM 
(
	SELECT 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID,
	SUM(Metric_Budget) AS Metric_Budget
	FROM 
	(

		SELECT 
		A.EmployeePK,
		A.Division,
		CASE 
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
			WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
		END 											AS PeriodDate,
		A.DistributionType,
		A.IncentiveMetricID,
		A.IncentivePlanID,
		A.SubSource,
		A.ACU_ID,
		B.BudgetValue AS Metric_Budget
		
		FROM #T_EMP A 
		JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_METRIC_BUDGET_ACTUALS] WHERE [Year]=@Year AND Metric='NETSALES_AMT') B 
		ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
		AND A.IncentiveMetricID 			= B.Metric
		
		AND (
				A.SubSource IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.SourceCode,'NA1')
				)
		AND (
				A.ACU_ID IS NULL
				OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.ACU_ID,'NA1')
				)

		AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.PeriodDate)
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.PeriodDate),0)))
													WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.PeriodDate),12,1))
												END
												)
				
		WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NETSALES_AMT'
		
		) M1_X
	
	GROUP BY
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID
		
		
	) M1 
		

LEFT JOIN 

(
	SELECT 
	EmployeePK,
	Division,
	PeriodDate,
	DistributionType,
	IncentiveMetricID,
	IncentivePlanID,
	SUM(NETSALES_AMT) AS NETSALES_AMT
	FROM 
	(
			SELECT 
			A.EmployeePK,
			A.Division,
			CASE 
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
				WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
			END 											AS PeriodDate,
			A.DistributionType,
			A.IncentiveMetricID,
			A.IncentivePlanID,
			A.SubSource,
			A.ACU_ID,
			B.NETSALES_AMT AS NETSALES_AMT
			
			FROM #T_EMP A 
			JOIN (SELECT * FROM [EDW_FCST].[FACT_SALES_ACTUAL_INCENTIVE] WHERE IDENTIFIER='APPOINTMENT_DATE' AND  BranchID NOT IN ('PBC-MN','PBC-WI')  -- ** Excluding Wisconsin & Minnesota For West
					) B 
			ON  A.Division 						= B.Division 
			
			AND (
					A.SubSource IS NULL
					OR COALESCE(A.SubSource,'NA1')  = COALESCE(B.TX_SourceCode,'NA1')
					)
			AND (
					A.ACU_ID IS NULL
					OR COALESCE(A.ACU_ID,'NA1')     = COALESCE(B.Market,'NA1')
					)
	
			AND A.PeriodDate					= ( CASE 
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'MONTHLY'     THEN EOMONTH(B.CalendarDate)
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'QUARTERLY'   THEN EOMONTH(DATEADD(MONTH, 2, DATEADD(QUARTER, DATEDIFF(QUARTER,0,B.CalendarDate),0)))
														WHEN A.DistributionType = 'YEARLY'      THEN EOMONTH(DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(B.CalendarDate),12,1))
													END
													)
					
			WHERE A.IncentiveMetricID='NETSALES_AMT'
			
			) M2_X
			
		GROUP BY 
		EmployeePK,
		Division,
		PeriodDate,
		DistributionType,
		IncentiveMetricID,
		IncentivePlanID
		
		
		) M2
		
ON 

M1.EmployeePK           =  M2.EmployeePK             AND 
M1.Division             =  M2.Division               AND 
M1.PeriodDate           =  M2.PeriodDate             AND 
M1.DistributionType     =  M2.DistributionType       AND 
M1.IncentiveMetricID    =  M2.IncentiveMetricID      AND 
M1.IncentivePlanID      =  M2.IncentivePlanID        	;







--################# FINAL TABLE UPDATE ###############

UPDATE M1 
SET M1.PV_PerformanceRatio = (M2.Metric_Actual * 1.000 / M2.Metric_Budget * 1.000 )

FROM [EDW_INC].[DIM_INCENTIVE_BONUS_MIN_OVERRIDES] M1
JOIN #T_EMP_METRICS M2
ON  M1.EmployeePK				= M2.EmployeePK
AND M1.PeriodDate				= M2.PeriodDate
AND M1.PersonalVolumeMetricID	= M2.IncentiveMetricID
AND M1.Division					= M2.Division
AND M1.DistributionType			= M2.DistributionType;
